name: Card

representativeVariants.desc: Selectable card with icon + title + description, 3x2 grid
Configuration panel card containing form controls
Result display card with progress bar + breakdown + status

anatomy.padding: --space-xl (32px) for card | --space-md (16px) for card-surface | 20px for scenario-card

structurePatterns: Scenario card: flex column, gap 8px, cursor pointer, hover border-color change
Scenario card selected: border --color-primary, bg rgba(37,99,235,0.08)
Config card: vertical stack of form sections separated by --storage-divider
Result card: scenario label → recommend bar → capacity → breakdown → badge → progress bar → advice
usageHints: Scenario cards: 3x2 grid on desktop (grid-cols-3), 2-col on sm, 1-col on mobile
Result card: single instance, max-width content, S3 only
Estimation note: always below result card, surface background
Card padding updated to 32px (Direction C breathing room)
doNotInvent: No card shadows (hierarchy via background color + border only)
No decorative gradients on card backgrounds
